context: Evaluates whether the agent uses `some x in collection` for iteration (prefer-some-in-iteration Regal rule) rather than the old bracket notation `x := collection[_]`.

checklist.name: Uses `some ... in` for iteration
checklist.description: The policy iterates over containers using `some container in ...containers` (or equivalent `some x in` form) — not `container := ...containers[_]` or `containers[_]` bare bracket notation

checklist.name: Checks each container image against approved registry
checklist.description: The deny rule checks each container's image starts with `registry.example.com/` using `startswith` or string prefix matching

checklist.name: deny contains msg pattern
checklist.description: The policy uses `deny contains msg if { ... }` to collect violations, including the container name and image in the message

checklist.name: Tests pass
checklist.description: All tests pass when running `opa test . -v`
